issue_title: Multiple entries are not cited as a single reference mark for CSL in-text
issue_body: For CSL, a normal citation with multiple entries is inserted as a single reference mark, but in-text citation with multiple citations is still split into multiple separate reference marks. Steps to reproduce: 1. Use JStyle, cite serveral entries at the same time. Entries are inserted as a single reference mark. 2. Use CSL, do step 1 again. It does not work for in-text citation
commit_message:
Cite multiple entries as a single citation for CSL in-text (#15706)

* Implement group citation for CSL in-text

* Add comments

* Update changelog
